description: Fix Bishamon force calculation: force 4 only when an OPPONENT monster is in the same province (different owner), not any monster from same clan
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts around line 4144, find the su-bishamon case in calculateForce function

Change the condition from checking if ANY other monster exists to checking if there is a monster owned by a DIFFERENT player (f.owner !== fig.owner). The current code checks f.monsterCardId !== 'su-bishamon' && f.id !== fig.id, but does NOT check f.owner !== fig.owner

The fix: change `province.figures.some(f => f.type === 'monster' && f.monsterCardId !== 'su-bishamon' && f.id !== fig.id)` to `province.figures.some(f => f.type === 'monster' && f.owner !== fig.owner)`
acceptance_criteria: Bishamon is force 4 only when an opponent's monster (any player with different owner) exists in the same province
Bishamon remains force 1 if the only other monsters in the province belong to the same player
npm run build passes without errors
